title: CobbleCritters
body:
# Cobblemon Critters
## Another take on Cobblemon
A Cobblemon based modpack with unified UI, all the mons plus some more, basic gyms, gacha machines, cool biomes, and lots more! (or maybe not)

## Included features

- Basic Cobblemon functionality
- Almost every Pokémon:
  - Mega Showdown
  - All The Mons
- Gimmicks
  - Mega Showdown
    - Mega Evolutions
    - Z-Moves
    - Dynamax
    - Terastallization
  - Nava's ZAMega
    - Mega Evolutions not included in Mega Showdown
- TM and TR
  - SimpleTMs
- Fakemons
  - Laser's Fakemon Pack
  - Triple Bakalutions
- New Biomes
  - Biomes o' Plenty
- Improved and extra structures
  - Cobblemon Additions
- Raids
  - Raid Dens
    - Regular
    - Mega
    - Tera
    - Dynamax
- Gyms
  - Rad Gyms
- Inventory Improvements
  - Tom's Simple Storage
  - Traveller's Backpacks
- Simplified Enchanting
  - Enchanting Infuser
- Decoration
  - Macaw's Furniture
  - Macaw's Lights and Lamps
  - Beautify
- Information helpers
  - EMI
  - EMI Loot
  - Cobbledex
    - Spawn Conditions
    - Evolutions
    - Forms
    - Other
  - Cobble EMI Stuff
    - Cooking Pot and Brewing recipes
  - Os' Mint Hints for Cobblemon
  - Cobblemon Pokenav
    - Spawn checker
  - Cobblemon Move Dex
    - Check learnable moves
  - Catch Indicator
  - Cobblemon Catch Rate Display
  - Xaero's Minimap
    - View nearby Pokémon
  - Xaero's Worldmap
  - Cobblemon WTBIT
  - Cobblemon: Extended Battle UI
    - More battle details
- Unified Visuals
  - Cobblemon Interface
  - Cobblemon Interface Modded
  - Tom's Cobblemoned
  - Other
- Improved Visuals
  - Hydro Reanimodel Pack
  - Cobblemon Accessories & More
  - Extra Move Animations
  - CobbleMotion
  - Cobblemon 3D Pokenavs
  - Figura
  - Iris Shaders
    - BSL
    - Complementary
    - Amethyst
- And more
  


## TODO
- Fix gyms
- Custom legendary structures
- Trainer Battles
- Improve ingame tools
